channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Turn 5 hours of study into 90 minutes with these AI tools
item.description: ime by 25–35% if you follow the process exa with AI Tools — use and when to use them.

item.title: Fine-tuning LLMs without a GPU finally explained
item.description: Fine-tune a 7B LLM in 112 minutes on a $0 GPU: 4-bit quantization, LoRA, ONNX Runtime, and real benchmarks without CUDA

item.title: We refactored legacy Python code with zero downtime — here’s how
item.description: Cut deployment time by 87% and API latency by 82% while adding tests to a 300k-line legacy Python healthtech app — here’s how we did it with observability, blue-green deployments, and surgical refactoring.

item.title: Switching Careers into Tech Later in Life (and Why You’re Not Too Late)
item.description: Career changers over 30 land tech jobs 2.3x faster by swapping generic demos for real problems and reframing experience as value—not 12 months faster with the right portfolio projects and resume narratives for mid-career transitions

item.title: GitOps fails with 'ImagePullBackOff' in Argo CD — and how to fix it
item.description: Fix Argo CD ImagePullBackOff with 'unauthorized' errors in 60% of clusters by debugging secrets, not tokens — registry URL typos and missing RBAC cause 80% of cases. Automate GitOps credential rotation to cut deployment outages by 60% with Argo CD v2.9.3 and argocd-image-updater v0.12.2.

item.title: Why your vector search returns empty results at scale (and how to fix it)
item.description: Cut vector search recall failures by 90% with these fixes — normalization drift, index sharding, and quantization artifacts exposed with real numbers and tools like Milvus 2.3.3 and Sentence-BERT.

item.title: Kafka isn't just for streams: a backend dev's survival guide
item.description: U usage | 55% | | Broker memory usage | 6.2 with Apache Kafka — a consumer group, and that's technically true — unt.

item.title: Developer mental models finally explained
item.description: Cut incident MTTR by 40% using feedback loops, second-order thinking, and inversion — sensors, actuators, and propagation delays in code and systems. (180 words)

item.title: Dev pay in 2026: Bay salaries crashed 22% while Singapore rose 11%
item.description: Dev pay in 2026: Bay salaries crashed 22% while Singapore rose 11% — compare eight cities with city-level PPP, rent, and equity using a single API endpoint and a $5 Fly.io instance.

item.title: Why GitLab’s async-first teams ship 42% faster than everyone else
item.description: Ship code 42% faster with async-first workflows — real metrics from 45 engineers over 18 months, with GitHub automation and Slack SLA rules that cut lead time from 3.2 days to 1.9 days.

item.title: 13 hard-won lessons from building 3 SaaS products solo
item.description: Ship a SaaS in 15 minutes with these 13 solo-founder-tested tools — latency under 150ms, $50/month budget, no ops at 100 users

item.title: Test-Driven Development finally explained
item.description: Ship 40% faster with Test-Driven Development — write failing tests first, then minimal code to pass them, using pytest, Jest, and fast local feedback loops. Cut CI time by 75% with parallel runs and behavioral contracts that gate deployments.

item.title: Will AI Replace Software Developers? The Honest Answer: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: Cut Will AI Replace Software Developers? The Honest Answer failures by understanding connection pooling and retry logic — real benchmarks, common mistak…

item.title: We reduced industrial downtime by 38% with digital twins
item.description: Reduced industrial downtime by 38% with digital twin technology — physics-based simulation, real-time calibration, and prescriptive guidance delivered 150ms response time and saved €420,000 annually in maintenance costs.

item.title: How to Build Passive Income as a Developer: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: Cut How to Build Passive Income as a Developer failures by understanding connection pooling and retry logic — real benchmarks, common mistakes, and a st…

item.title: TypeScript: Branded Types vs Nominal Typing Patterns
item.description: Cut API response latency by 40% and eliminate type-mixing bugs with TypeScript branded types — schema-driven generation, performance benchmarks, and the mistakes that waste hours of debugging.

item.title: 11 Time Management Hacks That Fixed My Productivity Drop
item.description: Cut context switches by 60% with these 11 time management hacks for developers—Linear + GitHub sync, Obsidian Tasks, GitLens, and the mistakes that break workflows.

item.title: 5 Reasons Senior Devs Quit Big Tech (Ranked by Impact)
item.description: Cut engineering velocity by 60% with 10-year-old monoliths — the real reasons senior devs quit Big Tech and how to spot them before joining, with concrete metrics from exit interviews and postmortems.

item.title: AI Automation vs Process Mining: Cutting Costs in 2024
item.description: AI automation cut invoice approval time from 14 days to 5 days but missed a 20-hour hidden loop in ERP logs, while process mining found it in two weeks. Learn how to choose between AI automation and process mining for cost cutting with real benchmarks, code examples, and ROI models.

item.title: 2026’s Breaches Proved One Thing: Compliance ≠ Security
item.description: In 2026, 88% of breaches exploited misconfigured trust boundaries after initial compromise—learn the fixes that cut dwell time from 204 days to 2.3 hours. Compliance ≠ security: SOC 2, ISO 27001, and PCI DSS reports failed to stop 3.8 billion customer records from leaking in the Snowflake breach.
